sentences.arabic: تُحِبُّ رَنَا اللُّغَةَ العَرَبِيَّةَ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ كُلِّ المَوَادِّ.
sentences.translation: Rana voli arapski jezik više od svih predmeta.
sentences.translationEn: Rana loves Arabic more than all other subjects.

sentences.arabic: تَقْرَأُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ كَلِمَاتٍ جَدِيدَةً وَتَكْتُبُهَا.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan čita nove riječi i piše ih.
sentences.translationEn: She reads new words every day and writes them.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتِ المُعَلِّمَةَ عَنْ مَعْنَى كَلِمَةٍ لَمْ تَفْهَمْهَا.
sentences.translation: Pitala je nastavnicu o značenju riječi koju nije razumjela.
sentences.translationEn: She asked the teacher about the meaning of a word she did not understand.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَتِ المُعَلِّمَةُ الكَلِمَةَ وَكَتَبَتْهَا عَلَى السَّبُّورَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnica je objasnila riječ i napisala je na tabli.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher explained the word and wrote it on the board.

sentences.arabic: حَفِظَتْ رَنَا الكَلِمَةَ وَاسْتَخْدَمَتْهَا فِي جُمْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Rana je zapamtila riječ i upotrijebila je u rečenici.
sentences.translationEn: Rana memorized the word and used it in a sentence.
